description: Composition Pink round neck top made of 95% viscose cotton and 5% lycra, has long puffed sleeves and graphic print Fit Regular Wash care Wash with warm water Do not bleach Use warm iron, do not iron on print arrow women caters to fashionistas with a taste for the exotic. This printed top is a glamourised version of the typical tee with its slim silhouette and puff sleeves. Pair it with richly hued denims, sky high heels and a vest. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
